시편 147:1.content: Praise Yah, for it is good to sing praises to our God; for it is pleasant and fitting to praise him.

시편 147:2.content: Yahweh builds up Jerusalem. He gathers together the outcasts of Israel.

시편 147:3.content: He heals the broken in heart, and binds up their wounds.

시편 147:4.content: He counts the number of the stars. He calls them all by their names.

시편 147:5.content: Great is our Lord, and mighty in power. His understanding is infinite.

시편 147:6.content: Yahweh upholds the humble. He brings the wicked down to the ground.

시편 147:7.content: Sing to Yahweh with thanksgiving. Sing praises on the harp to our God,

시편 147:8.content: who covers the sky with clouds, who prepares rain for the earth, who makes grass grow on the mountains.

시편 147:9.content: He provides food for the livestock, and for the young ravens when they call.

시편 147:10.content: He doesn’t delight in the strength of the horse. He takes no pleasure in the legs of a man.

시편 147:11.content: Yahweh takes pleasure in those who fear him, in those who hope in his loving kindness.

시편 147:12.content: Praise Yahweh, Jerusalem! Praise your God, Zion!

시편 147:13.content: For he has strengthened the bars of your gates. He has blessed your children within you.

시편 147:14.content: He makes peace in your borders. He fills you with the finest of the wheat.

시편 147:15.content: He sends out his commandment to the earth. His word runs very swiftly.

시편 147:16.content: He gives snow like wool, and scatters frost like ashes.

시편 147:17.content: He hurls down his hail like pebbles. Who can stand before his cold?

시편 147:18.content: He sends out his word, and melts them. He causes his wind to blow, and the waters flow.

시편 147:19.content: He shows his word to Jacob, his statutes and his ordinances to Israel.

시편 147:20.content: He has not done this for just any nation. They don’t know his ordinances. Praise Yah!
